headline: ₹100-500 Cr at risk if disclosure lapses or capex underperforms — Adani Group's $21B renewable energy capex signals sector ambition but limited immediate ESG impact for Adani Power
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, GRI, TCFD disclosure obligations; no penalty unless non-compliant.
No current P/E impact; future upside if green revenue grows.
No immediate cost of capital change; green financing potential if taxonomy-aligned.
